content.text: In this video, I'm going to show you the
custom MCP file that we built inside of
Claude for our agency to build SEO and
GEO proposals that used to take 8 hours,
cut it down all the way to 30 minutes,
and we improved on it. This right here
is what I'm going to walk you through in
this video. Don't worry, I'm going to go
through slide by slide, just giving you
a teaser so you stick around so you can
see the quality and the depth of the
proposal that I built. But it's also not
slop. It's not overkill. This is very

the best part is that you can have
access to it, too. My one pitch inside

inside of this proposal. But before we

dilemma behind SEO specific agency
proposals.
And that is traditionally there's really
been two options. Option A is to just
send out a template that's basically
scope work. Here's all the things that
we're going to do for you for your
business. Keyword research, link
building, etc. very little
customization,
very little about them, the prospect,
but you do it for speed because every
day that your proposal delays in getting
to the prospect, it's decaying. It's
like a real estate lead. The further you
get away from that initial discovery
conversation, the lower your chances are
of closing them because you got to
strike while the iron is hot after the
discovery call. You got to be able to
get them a full proposal within two
business days or your chance of closing
them is going to go down. Option B is to
do something highly custom. We used to
do these very deep analysis. We still

to do it. I had to hire a full-time

them done, but still it was working off

better, we can do angles. An angle is a
part of a proposal. That's an actual
pitch, right? When we're working and
pitching these different law firms that
we work with, we're able to put in
hypersp specific angles. So, for
example, here's two different examples.
One, let's say we go through the
analysis process, we see that their

individual office locations that they're

Well, we usually will pitch an angle of
like opening up a new office location.
We'll do all the research. These are the
